description_long: This house features a symmetrical brick facade with two prominent front staircases leading up to twin entry doors, flanked by manicured shrubs. The roof is steeply pitched and dark, with a central gable and two side wings, giving the structure a stately, traditional appearance. Large, multi-pane windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The sides and rear of the house are clad in horizontal siding, with additional windows and a secondary entrance visible. The front yard is landscaped with a central flower bed and dual driveways, enhancing curb appeal. Decorative iron railings and a modest stoop add to the classic suburban charm.
description: A stately two-story brick and siding house with a steep dark roof, symmetrical windows, twin front staircases, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with twin staircases, symmetrical windows, brick facade, and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view revealing horizontal siding, a secondary entrance with steps and railing, and the extension of the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with symmetrical window rows and no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing siding, windows, and the secondary entrance with steps.
attribute_entryway_design: Twin front doors accessed by brick steps with iron railings, flanked by shrubs and a central flower bed, no porch or overhang.
